title: Import & export
introPre: Back up your transactions to a CSV file, or bring data in from a CSV.
exportNote: Downloads all your transactions as a CSV in PocketCare's own format — which you can re-import here anytime.
trialNote: Importing data is not available during the free trial. Please upgrade to Premium to import your historical data.
skipDup: Skip rows that already exist (same account, amount, type & date)
noRows: No rows found — check the file and the selected format.
footerNote: New accounts and categories are created automatically (accounts default to “savings” — you can change the type afterward). Importing recomputes balances from your ledger. The Wallet by BudgetBakers importer is in beta — transfers may need a quick review.
